TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Howak, title = Howak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Howak} }

S.FORM: alang Howak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 342 buwan, 471 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 106 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 365 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 22%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Howak hya' ga Cilafinan. tay mkyahu' na Howak hya' ga Asiroay . rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Howak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Howak ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Howak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 342 buwan, 471 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 106 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 365 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 22%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Howak hya' ga Cilafinan. tay mkyahu' na Howak hya' ga Asiroay . rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Howak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Howak ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħowak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ħowak ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨila*inan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħowak ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕiroaj . rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ħowak ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ħowak ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
